title: Goal-Line Intercept
description: Loose ball rolling or flying toward the goal. A defending player must be able to cut it off and intercept it — ball must not become non-interactable near scoring.

expected_outcomes.description: Defender collects the ball by moving into its path — automatic pickup applies.

must_not_outcomes.description: Ball ignores the defender near the goal zone — either phased through or treated as already scored.

notes: Critical for Slam Dunk where hoops are elevated — ball arc toward hoop must be interceptable by a jumping defender.
